expectations.text: A new checkpoint commit was created on top of the initial skeleton commit.
expectations.evidence: git-log-oneline.txt shows 2 commits: initial + the new checkpoint.

expectations.text: The commit subject is a single substantive sentence (not 'Updates', 'wip', or empty).
expectations.evidence: Subject: 'Added newest-first sorting to list_widgets() and a separate colour filter module, after tracing a sort bug to a consumed generator in _load_from_db().'

expectations.text: CHECKPOINTS.md exists at the repo root and contains exactly one session entry matching the commit subject character-for-character.
expectations.evidence: CHECKPOINTS.md entry matches the commit subject verbatim.

expectations.text: The CHECKPOINTS.md entry is prefixed with today's date in YYYY-MM-DD format.
expectations.evidence: Entry starts with '2026-04-08 —'.

expectations.text: The commit body mentions the rejected functools.lru_cache alternative and explains the reasoning.
expectations.evidence: Dedicated 'Rejected alternative' section covers lru_cache + out-of-band mutation reasoning.

expectations.text: The commit body mentions the sorted()/generator dead end.
expectations.evidence: Dedicated 'Dead end' section explains the consumed generator.

expectations.text: The commit body references specific file paths that were touched.
expectations.evidence: src/widgets.py, src/filters.py, tests/test_filters.py all named.

expectations.text: config.draft.yml was NOT added to the commit.
expectations.evidence: files-committed.txt: only CHECKPOINTS.md, src/filters.py, src/widgets.py, tests/test_filters.py. config.draft.yml still untracked.

expectations.text: The commit body is substantive: more than 400 characters.
expectations.evidence: Body is ~2500 chars.

expectations.text: A new git commit was created even though no source files changed.
expectations.evidence: CHECKPOINTS.md was the staged diff — real commit, not --allow-empty.

expectations.text: The commit subject names the root cause (nginx/cookie/domain/staging).
expectations.evidence: Subject: 'Traced staging logout regression to an nginx cookie-domain mismatch in infra/nginx/staging.conf — no code change...'.

expectations.text: CHECKPOINTS.md exists and contains one dated entry matching the commit subject.
expectations.evidence: Entry matches the commit subject verbatim, dated 2026-04-08.

expectations.text: The commit body explains the root cause (cookie domain / nginx proxy).
expectations.evidence: Body explains SNI + parent-domain cookie rejection, nginx not rewriting Set-Cookie.

expectations.text: The commit body references infra/nginx/staging.conf as the fix location.
expectations.evidence: Named multiple times with proxy_cookie_domain.

expectations.text: The commit body states that app/auth.py is correct and was NOT changed.
expectations.evidence: 'Do NOT touch app/auth.py. The application code is correct.'

expectations.text: The commit body mentions the Monday maintenance window plan.
expectations.evidence: 'defer the fix to Monday's maintenance window'.

expectations.text: The commit body is substantive: more than 400 characters.
expectations.evidence: Body is ~2500 chars.

expectations.text: Response shows evidence of reading CHECKPOINTS.md.
expectations.evidence: commands-run.txt lists 'Read CHECKPOINTS.md'.

expectations.text: Response identifies the nginx/cookie/staging session as 'the auth thing'.
expectations.evidence: Response references the 2026-04-06 staging logout session.

expectations.text: Response retrieves the full commit body via git log --grep or git show.
expectations.evidence: commands-run.txt: 'git log --all --grep="Traced the staging logout bug" -1 --format=%B'.

expectations.text: Response mentions app/auth.py is correct and doesn't need changes.
expectations.evidence: 'app/auth.py sets the cookie correctly'.

expectations.text: Response points to infra/nginx/staging.conf as the fix location.
expectations.evidence: 'The hole is in infra/nginx/staging.conf'.

expectations.text: Response mentions proxy_cookie_domain or the Monday plan.
expectations.evidence: Both: 'proxy_cookie_domain directive' and 'maintenance window / Monday'.

expectations.text: Response summarises past session back to user before making changes.
expectations.evidence: Full 3-bullet recap, then 'Before I touch anything' question.

expectations.text: Response does NOT pull the wrong session (marketing or CSV).
expectations.evidence: No mention of styles.css or import_csv.py.
